prompt: Design a digital calendar app interface using the monthly grid layout from the first image and event color-coding system from the second image.
prompt_refined: Generate a digital calendar application interface. The main screen should feature a monthly grid layout, displaying multiple weeks of dates (e.g., 5-6 weeks) in a 7-day structure from Sunday to Saturday, matching the visual style and date arrangement seen in image 1. Below this monthly grid, include a section detailing events for a selected day, similar to the event list presentation in image 1. Each event entry in this list must incorporate a small colored indicator next to its title. These indicators should follow the color-coding system and specific labels outlined in the legend of image 2: 'Bugs fixes/general maintenance' (purple), 'New in-demand features' (light orange), 'Office hours' (light blue), 'Continuing education' (yellow), 'Lunch' (light green), and 'Meetings' (red).
objects: Dates for 5-6 weeks arranged in a 7-day structure (Sunday to Saturday)
Event list section (below the monthly grid)
Small colored indicators next to event titles
Purple colored indicator for 'Bugs fixes/general maintenance' type events
Light orange colored indicator for 'New in-demand features' type events
Light blue colored indicator for 'Office hours' type events
Yellow colored indicator for 'Continuing education' type events
